opinion.h1: PURCELL v. QUAKER REALTY CO., 239 U.S. 635 (1916)
opinion.h2: ROBERT M. PURCELL et al., Plaintiffs in Error, v. QUAKER REALTY COMPANY, LIMITED. No. 152.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. E. Howard McCaleb for plaintiffs in error.
Mr. William Winans Wall for defendants in error.

Dismissed for want of jurisdiction upon the authority of (1) Castillo v. McConnico, 168 U.S. 674, 42 L. Ed. 622, 18 Sup. Ct. Rep. 229; De Bearn v. Safe Deposit & T. Co. 233 U.S. 24, 34, 58 S. L. ed. 833, 837, 34 Sup. Ct. Rep. 584; McDonald v. Oregon R. & Nav. Co. 233 U.S. 665, 669, 670 S., 58 L. Ed. 1145, 1148, 1149, 34 Sup. Ct. Rep. 772; (2) Ross v. Oregon, 227 U.S. 150, 161, 57 S. L. ed. 458, 463, 33 Sup. Ct. Rep. 220, Ann. Cas. 1914C, 224; Moore-Mansfield Constr. Co. v. Electrical Installation Co. 234 U.S. 619, 624, 58 S. L. ed. 1503, 1505, 34 Sup. Ct. Rep. 941; Willoughby v. Chicago, cago, 235 U.S. 45, 59 L. Ed. 123, 35 Sup. Ct. Rep. 23; Cleveland & P. R. Co. v. Cleveland, 235 U.S. 50, 59 L. Ed. 127, 35 Sup. Ct. Rep. 21.[ Purcell v. Quaker Realty Co. 239 U.S. 635 (1916) ]
